Name: Kitzen
Battle Niche: Glass cannon with recoil boost
Visual Description: A fox with ember trails and burning tail tufts
Lore Snippet: Born in Emberveil, Blazepaw races alongside lava currents for sport.

Name: Pyrrin
Battle Niche: Stacks heat for a burst flame move
Visual Description: A jackal-like creature with molten cracks across its body
Lore Snippet: Once used to ignite ceremonial fires in the Emberveil arena.

Name: Nyoroa
Battle Niche: Evasive, whirlpool zone control
Visual Description: A serpentine fish with flowing fins and glowing eyes
Lore Snippet: Said to create calming currents for Tidewake pilgrims.

Name: Otanei
Battle Niche: Ally cleanser and water shield generator
Visual Description: A playful otter with mist-like fur and shimmering whiskers
Lore Snippet: Guides lost boats safely to Tidewake shores.

Name: Mokoro
Battle Niche: Leech seed zones and regen buffs
Visual Description: A turtle-like plant beast with flowering moss on its back
Lore Snippet: Carries ancient seeds from Verdanta's oldest tree.

Name: Rootmaw
Battle Niche: Roots into the ground to resist knockback
Visual Description: A moss-covered beast with bark armor and thorned tusks
Lore Snippet: Defends sacred groves deep in Verdanta.

Name: Zintrel
Battle Niche: Volt switcher with shock traps
Visual Description: A sleek fox with electric fur and lightning bolt ears
Lore Snippet: Delivers coded messages between Stormspire towers.

Name: Glacyn
Battle Niche: Snow cloak + freeze synergy
Visual Description: An arctic wolf with frostbitten fangs and glowing breath
Lore Snippet: Stalks prey across the Glacien tundra in silence.

Name: Torusk
Battle Niche: Unmovable—gains defense when staying in place
Visual Description: An armored badger with sandstone plates
Lore Snippet: Tunnels through Gravemarch canyons to guard sacred stones.

Name: Sorin
Battle Niche: Gale-boosted priority strike
Visual Description: A raptor with cloud-like wings and jetstream trails
Lore Snippet: Challenges rivals in aerial duels above Skyrend.

Name: Noema
Battle Niche: Stacks focus to boost all special stats
Visual Description: An owl with crystal plumage and third eye
Lore Snippet: Oracles in Cerevale consult it before dream rituals.

Name: Mourin
Battle Niche: Avoids contact moves, lays curse traps
Visual Description: A floating doll with one cracked mask and tendrils of smoke
Lore Snippet: Whispers of Umbradeep say it remembers every soul.

Name: Somrel
Battle Niche: Reduces enemy healing and boosts decay effects
Visual Description: A hunched creature with twisted horns and rotting cloak
Lore Snippet: Spawns from Malmortis’s plague pits.

Name: Elarin
Battle Niche: Heals and protects adjacent allies
Visual Description: A glowing deer with a halo and golden leaves for antlers
Lore Snippet: Prays nightly atop Halohaven peaks.

Name: Eldrune
Battle Niche: Unlocks ancient runes for stat buffs
Visual Description: A dragon-lizard hybrid etched with glowing runes
Lore Snippet: Each battle echoes the wars of Eldralore's past.

Name: Kyntra
Battle Niche: Reflects tech-based attacks, hazard denial
Visual Description: A beetle-bot with rotating shell panels and antennae
Lore Snippet: Wanders Netraxis, absorbing rogue code.

Name: Mirellon
Battle Niche: Warp beam scales with time in battle
Visual Description: A jellyfish-like entity that floats on invisible gravity fields
Lore Snippet: Zips across Zenithreach on meteor trails.

Name: Mimari
Battle Niche: Learns moves from allies and enemies
Visual Description: A raccoon-badger mix with shifting fur colors
Lore Snippet: Lives in Nohara and thrives in all biomes.

Name: Gravanel
Battle Niche: Physical melee plant with vine strikes
Visual Description: A boar with petal-covered back and root tendrils for legs
Lore Snippet: Rampages through flower fields in Verdanta.

Name: Solaire
Battle Niche: Explosion-based magic finisher
Visual Description: A fiery bird that combusts mid-flight into a burst phoenix
Lore Snippet: Flies only once per season above Emberveil.

Name: Finyu
Battle Niche: Washes away hazards and debuffs
Visual Description: A cub-like amphibian with water pads on its feet
Lore Snippet: Helps train young Kiboru in Tidewake schools.

Name: Fernace
Battle Niche: Burning brambles enhance physical strikes
Visual Description: A boar with fire-veined vines spiraling from its tusks
Lore Snippet: Roams the Firethorn Wilds, igniting enemy camps and rooting invaders.

Name: Narviu
Battle Niche: Applies slow and leeching mist
Visual Description: A ghostly narwhal with icy fins and misty breath
Lore Snippet: Guards the frozen harbors of Cryomar Bay, freezing trespassers in fog.

Name: Vollox
Battle Niche: Charges up after taking damage
Visual Description: A tortoise with lightning-charged boulders on its back
Lore Snippet: Harnesses Stormspire surges and Gravemarch stones to create thunderquakes.

Name: Sombrae
Battle Niche: Phases in and out of turns, confusing enemies
Visual Description: A floating mask with shadowy ribbons that whisper riddles
Lore Snippet: Appears in the Whispering Vale to test the will of travelers.

Name: Hexel
Battle Niche: Reflects debuffs and disables enemy buffs
Visual Description: A spiderbot with glitching limbs and cracked chrome
Lore Snippet: Its code was corrupted in the Silicon Wastes, granting unnatural powers.

Name: Trevolt
Battle Niche: Strikes and seeds simultaneously
Visual Description: A panther with electrified vines for claws
Lore Snippet: Strikes from canopy shadows in the Jungle Spark Expanse.

Name: Skaiya
Battle Niche: Sets weather and grants evasion buffs
Visual Description: A swan-like Kiboru with flowing veils of skylight
Lore Snippet: Hailed as a sacred omen in Skyrend and Halohaven.

Name: Scaithe
Battle Niche: Deals bonus damage after a fallen ally
Visual Description: A demonic hound wreathed in chains and black flame
Lore Snippet: Forged in Emberveil prisons, it roams Malmortis borderlands.

Name: Zerine
Battle Niche: Freezes then shocks for bonus damage
Visual Description: A lynx with crackling fur and snowburst aura
Lore Snippet: Dashes between Glacien cliffs, leaving spark-frost trails.

Name: Mylaren
Battle Niche: Establishes a field that boosts growth and legends
Visual Description: A deer-dragon with barklike scales and glowing antlers
Lore Snippet: Said to be the seedling of an Eldralore world tree.

Name: Gravyrn
Battle Niche: Gains DEF in stormy weather
Visual Description: A griffon with rock-plated feathers and sonic screeches
Lore Snippet: Guards cliffside battlements between Skyrend and Gravemarch.

Name: Neorift
Battle Niche: Teleports between enemy targets
Visual Description: A neon-shelled insect that phases between light and code
Lore Snippet: Zips between Zenithreach and Netraxis through unstable rifts.

Name: Lumira
Battle Niche: Heals allies but siphons their debuffs
Visual Description: A weeping angel statue with cracked wings
Lore Snippet: Left forgotten between Halohaven’s holy lands and Malmortis’s sorrow fields.

Name: Eurgeist
Battle Niche: Summons tide armor from souls of drowned foes
Visual Description: A translucent eel ghost with ocean glyphs glowing in its body
Lore Snippet: Haunts the sea cliffs between Tidewake and Umbradeep.

Name: Soltren
Battle Niche: Stacks speed with each KO
Visual Description: A falcon wreathed in fire-lightning feathers
Lore Snippet: Crashes from Emberveil peaks into Stormspire lightning nests.

Name: Synkra
Battle Niche: Steals initiative with mind shocks
Visual Description: A monkey with neuron-lit hair and spark eyes
Lore Snippet: Studies battlefield behavior from Stormspire towers and Cerevale domes.

Name: Myrabyte
Battle Niche: Copies enemy moves post-KO
Visual Description: A floating hard-drive with soul flames stored inside
Lore Snippet: Constructed in Netraxis to contain wandering spirits.

Name: Frisela
Battle Niche: Heals allies and shields with snow
Visual Description: A foxlike beast with radiant frost feathers and a glowing halo
Lore Snippet: Descends from Glacien peaks during winter rituals.

Name: Noxtar
Battle Niche: Spends HP to deal high AoE damage
Visual Description: A skeletal crustacean leaking black stars from its shell
Lore Snippet: Scuttles across Zenithreach's void tide pools.

Name: Rokhara
Battle Niche: Each attack unlocks a passive rune
Visual Description: A sabertooth with runes glowing beneath stone plates
Lore Snippet: Wakes during earthquakes in Eldralore and Gravemarch.

Name: Turtaura
Battle Niche: Shields allies and resets terrain
Visual Description: A floating satellite turtle with light orbiting it
Lore Snippet: Built in Netraxis as a beacon by Halohaven engineers.

Name: Miravi
Battle Niche: Can mimic enemy support moves
Visual Description: A semi-transparent fox with trail illusions
Lore Snippet: Lures enemies into traps across Umbradeep breezes.

Name: Lychbloom
Battle Niche: Nullifies stat drops and status
Visual Description: A hermit-crab ghost with a garden growing on its shell
Lore Snippet: Grows from grave-moss in the Verdanta–Umbradeep paths.

Name: Galeva
Battle Niche: Can reset battlefield states once per match
Visual Description: A light-furred beast with a windmill tail
Lore Snippet: Wanders Nohara and Skyrend, known as a sign of balance.

Name: Crynith
Battle Niche: Randomly disables enemy passives for 2 turns
Visual Description: A hyena-like specter with twisted bone ridges forming glyphs down its back. Its jaw flickers with voidlight, constantly laughing in low, glitchy echoes.
Lore Snippet: In haunted pockets of Umbradeep, Vyrisk is blamed when luck twists cruelly. It doesn't feed on fear — it feeds on *expectation*, breaking the rules with chaotic glee.

Name: Galivor
Battle Niche: Summons a personal myth field that strengthens signature moves each turn it's active
Visual Description: A goat-like being with curling horn-rings covered in story-etched bark. Its wool flows like smoke, and each eye carries a miniature galaxy.
Lore Snippet: Jireath is carved in cave murals across Eldralore — not as fact, but as a warning: the moment a myth begins to believe in itself, it becomes real.

Name: Caelira
Battle Niche: Converts enemy status attempts into self-healing
Visual Description: A peacock-swan hybrid with a semi-transparent halo fan instead of a tail. Its neck is etched with hymn-like runes that glow when status magic nears.
Lore Snippet: It is said that Cygnari sings only when insulted — not out of rage, but to purify the air itself. Shrines in Halohaven paint its feathers as a song in motion.

Name: Skirra
Battle Niche: Can dodge moves on swap-ins based on terrain
Visual Description: A gazelle-falcon hybrid with membrane wings that fold flush to its sides. Its tail splits into three streamlines that flutter when airborne.
Lore Snippet: Drivale drifts between Skyrend wind gates, racing storm currents. Some say it vanishes when followed — not from speed, but choice.

Name: Friselle
Battle Niche: Deals bonus damage in snowy terrain and slows enemies on crit
Visual Description: A flamingo-like creature with icicle-petal wings. Its long legs leave glowing frost stamps, and its feathers reflect fragmented skies.
Lore Snippet: In high canopies of Glacien’s frostlight trees, Glayline dances silently on frozen branches — never cracking a twig, yet always shifting the cold.

Name: Quenara
Battle Niche: Creates a safety field that revives one fainted ally with 20% HP once per match
Visual Description: A platypus-shaped warden with bell-shaped tail markings that ring when it moves. Its body is partially translucent and pulses like a heartbeat.
Lore Snippet: Some say Traloom doesn’t heal — it remembers. Found near memorypools in Umbradeep, it swims backward through time, pulling the living from endings.

Name: Orrikai
Battle Niche: Randomizes terrain effects every 5 turns
Visual Description: A mole-like creature with mirrored eye-plates and a spinning compass-shell embedded in its back. Its fur shimmers differently from every angle.
Lore Snippet: Legends say Orrikai is the original source of direction — not by guiding, but by changing where the path begins.

Name: Thalassa
Battle Niche: Creates a field where moves loop once — repeated at 25% power
Visual Description: A whale-manta fusion with constellation scars and ribbon fins that vibrate with delay-energy. Its underbelly holds a visual echo of what just happened.
Lore Snippet: When Vastrell breaches the atmosphere, light echoes for days. Many believe it isn’t celestial — it *records* the cosmos from below.

Name: Sonari
Battle Niche: Halves damage from repeated moves
Visual Description: A snail-bot creature with audio-wave shells. Its antennae blink Morse-like data and broadcast confusion pulses when hit repeatedly.
Lore Snippet: Mollivox is a relic of Netraxis deep code — a shell built to learn, then endure. It doesn’t retaliate — it *wears you down by remembering.*

Name: Brunhoka
Battle Niche: Ignores terrain penalties completely and buffs on shifting fields
Visual Description: A bear-goat hybrid with hooves shaped like stone wheels and a ridged spine that flexes with tectonic force. Dust gathers in its fur like memory sediment.
Lore Snippet: Brunhoka walks not over land, but with it. Its presence is rumored to quiet quakes — not by resisting them, but by embodying their rhythm.

Name: Ignovar
Battle Niche: Boosts power for each KO in last 3 turns
Visual Description: A boar-like flamebeast with glowing forge-coil tusks and ember-runes across its flanks. Its tail is a furnace pipe that vents sparks with each breath.
Lore Snippet: Ferrunox was once sealed in the Emberveil heartforge. Its escape triggered the last flamefall — not from anger, but unfinished momentum.

Name: Pandana
Battle Niche: Applies protective fields to weak allies only
Visual Description: A deer-panda hybrid with floating crystal leaves that orbit like a soft shield. Its breath glows when near the vulnerable.
Lore Snippet: In Halohaven, Miralys is known as the Hope Bloom — not for strength, but selective grace. It appears not when called, but when needed most.

Name: Spynether
Battle Niche: Can tag an enemy for extra damage if they switch
Visual Description: A spider-like creature with lightning-thread spinnerets and legs shaped like tuning rods. Its back patterns change like circuit boards mid-battle.
Lore Snippet: In Netraxis spirefields, Spynether is a whisper — seen only as flash-glints across skyglass. Its thread doesn’t trap — it predicts escape.

Name: Frayori
Battle Niche: Reduces cooldowns or delay timers of nearby allies’ abilities
Visual Description: A lemurlike glider with scarf-like tail plumes and feathered ear-wisps. It rides jetstreams invisibly, known only by a scent of ozone and lilac.
Lore Snippet: Frayori’s appearance signals moments of sudden clarity — a breeze that turns back time by seconds. In Skyrend temples, it’s carved into hourglass edges.

Name: Thunavax
Battle Niche: Can reverse move order on odd-numbered turns
Visual Description: A chimeric pangolin with segmented magnetic scales that ripple outward like soundwave coils. Its tail is a balanced tuning fork that resonates in battle, modulating electric frequency with precise vibrations.
Lore Snippet: Thunavax is said to be the first to hear the pulse of the earth. In Nohara’s charged plains, it folds into a coil and hums — shifting wind, voltage, and rhythm with every movement. Elders call it the ‘Ear of Equilibrium.’

Name: Cryzmare
Battle Niche: Deals double damage to sleeping or frozen targets
Visual Description: A moose-like beast with antlers carved from permafrost, each tip tipped with shards resembling dreamcatcher webbing. Its fur drips with spectral frost, and its breath fog freezes into shrieking faces mid-air.
Lore Snippet: In the silent reaches of Gravemarch, travelers whisper of Cryzmare’s howl — a sound that enters dreams and freezes them in place. It haunts the liminal moment between thought and sleep, hunting the unrested.

Name: Zenthra
Battle Niche: Reflects debuffs back to the sender every third turn
Visual Description: A sleek aye-aye-like creature with a luminous forehead crystal and fractal tails that spin in recursive spirals. Its fingers are long and brush the air in slow arcs, tracing defensive runes mid-combat.
Lore Snippet: Zenthra was once believed to be a hallucination — a 'guardian glitch' that emerged during meditation rites. Now, the monks of Cerevale carve its shape into temple walls, seeking to summon its mirrored clarity.

Name: Florhorn
Battle Niche: Gains damage resistance for each ally still standing
Visual Description: An armored ox-like creature with ridged bark horns that bloom with canopy moss under stress. Pollen steams from vents in its shoulders when it stands still too long, creating microclimates around it.
Lore Snippet: In the canyon hollows of Verdanta, Florhorn is seen as a living root-vault — anchoring growth and memory. Even predators lie down beside it when storms pass overhead, drawn to its grounded breath.

Name: Virebloom
Battle Niche: Creates a battlefield state where healing is converted to shields
Visual Description: A floating tulip-headed jellyfish with galactic pollen sacs orbiting its head like moons. Its petals open to reveal a constellation map, which shifts slightly every battle.
Lore Snippet: Sailors navigating by starlight speak of Virebloom’s bloom coinciding with new moons. It drifts through tidevaults, weaving invisible gardens in the sky that only the lost can find.

Name: Brontuor
Battle Niche: Summons shifting terrain hazards that change each turn
Visual Description: A brontosaurus-shaped guardian with terraces built into its mossy back, each layered with ancient tablets and carved myth-glyphs. Its footsteps release pressure blooms of powdered stone sigils.
Lore Snippet: Brontuor is known in Gravemarch legends as the ‘Heir of the Moving Mountain.’ Whenever it moves, lands realign and boundaries blur — entire territories marked only by its resting place.

Name: Kelvoura
Battle Niche: Reduces enemy crit chance and resets all luck-based effects
Visual Description: A swanlike creature with long, curving wings that refract moonlight like prisms. Its neck is formed of glacial glass, semi-hollow and echoing with snowfall sounds as it moves.
Lore Snippet: The folk of Glacien call Kelvoura the ‘Silent Swayer.’ It’s said to appear before avalanches not to warn — but to witness. The land calms in its presence, waiting for the future to fall.

Name: Duskrin
Battle Niche: Can trap one enemy move in ‘limbo’ — unusable for 3 turns
Visual Description: A sleek tarsier-like figure with twin ghostly tails and deep black eyes that glow with shifting memories. Its ears are asymmetrical mirrors — one records the past, one hears thoughts not yet spoken.
Lore Snippet: Duskrin is often glimpsed by those on the brink of decision. In Cerevale folklore, it's the one who removes choices to reveal truths — not by force, but by silence.

Name: Glintara
Battle Niche: Can reflect one ally's next ability at +50% power
Visual Description: A capybara-sized pangolin with scale-shards of mirrored starlight. From its back rises a low orbiting halo-band of light fractures that warp reality briefly around allies.
Lore Snippet: In Halohaven myths, Glintara is said to be born when a wish lands gently instead of burning. It guides by reflection, offering not answers, but better versions of what already exists.

Name: Aetherix
Battle Niche: Unblockable when terrain is neutralized
Visual Description: A hummingbird-dragon hybrid with wings that disassemble into feathered glyphs mid-flight. Its tail streams are etched with sacred calligraphy that vanishes if you try to read it directly.
Lore Snippet: Aetherix flits through Skyrend ruins like punctuation in a forgotten poem. When it stops, winds die. When it stirs, even echoes chase after it — searching for meaning in its motion.

Name: Moondrel
Battle Niche: Copies enemy stat lean temporarily after hit
Visual Description: A featherless owl-Kiboru with a crescent-shaped hood where its eyes should be. Its body is a smooth blend of matte gray and shimmer-scale, rippling subtly when adapting.
Lore Snippet: Moondrel does not fly. It drifts. Found only in quiet eclipse zones, it is said to reflect what the world needs — never more, never less. A guardian not of light, but of balance between.

Name: Grallophex
Battle Niche: Builds charge with movement — every reposition adds stacking damage
Visual Description: A crocodile-armadillo hybrid with kinetic coil plating along its back. Its legs are short and spring-loaded, each step creating a high-pitched whine like spinning turbines.
Lore Snippet: In the chargefields of Netraxis, Grallophex was first discovered tunneling — not for prey, but to charge its coils. When it coils, it sparks. When it uncurls, it crashes.

Name: Tundrillith
Battle Niche: Drains enemy stat boosts upon contact
Visual Description: A shaggy, slothlike creature with fur made of soft snowflakes. It carries a glowing spinal root beneath its coat, visible only when struck — pulsing with soft white light.
Lore Snippet: To meet a Tundrillith is to forget your anger. Stories say it absorbs ego and noise, leaving only silence in its wake. It does not defend its territory — the land simply quiets around it.

Name: Mythdrae
Battle Niche: Deals more damage the fewer allies remain alive
Visual Description: A sleek, crimson dragon wreathed in golden ink-fire. Its scales are inscribed with tales of Kiboru fables, each glowing brighter as the battle becomes more desperate.
Lore Snippet: Mythdrae is not a dragon — it is the story of one. When its allies fall, its tale continues, burning brighter. Some say it’s the final chapter of every myth, given form.

Name: Clairowisp
Battle Niche: Sees enemy next move and grants ally evasion if it's a high-damage action
Visual Description: A floating anglerfish-like creature with a will-o-wisp orb hanging from its head. Its fins are parchment-thin and scripted with moving glyphs that adjust mid-battle.
Lore Snippet: Clairowisp drifts near Halohaven shrines, where prophecy and light converge. It doesn't speak the future — it illuminates what might be, flickering just long enough for the wise to step aside.
